description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image. Set a before_script that creates a virtual environment named common, upgrades pip, activates the venv, upgrades wheel and setuptools, and installs test requirements from requirements_test.txt. Define two stages: test and publish. Add a test-django-sqlite job in the test stage that runs make coverage. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are defined.
